title: Project capstone: data visualization workflows
summary: Treat the project chapters on generated data, downloads, and APIs as a workflow for moving from raw inputs to meaningful visual output.

items.prompt: What is the usual order from raw external data to a publishable chart?

solution.summary: Acquire the data, inspect it, clean or reshape it, choose the right visual encoding, then annotate the takeaway.

items.prompt: What is one reason API data needs extra validation before charting it?

solution.summary: API payloads can change or contain missing and malformed values, so validation prevents silent downstream errors.

items.prompt: Outline a mini project that uses downloaded data to answer one concrete question with a chart.

solution.summary: A good project brief ties the data source, analysis step, and visual output to one focused question.
checklist: Choose the chart and why it fits.
